name: GitHub CLI
quickStart: gh auth login && gh repo clone vercel/next.js

name: Git LFS
quickStart: git lfs install && git lfs track '*.psd'

name: Google Cloud CLI
quickStart: gcloud auth login && gcloud config set project my-project

name: kubectl
quickStart: kubectl config get-contexts && kubectl get pods -A

name: Helm
quickStart: helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami && helm list

name: Terraform
installCommand: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew install hashicorp/tap/terraform

name: Vault
installCommand: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew install hashicorp/tap/vault

name: Consul
installCommand: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew install hashicorp/tap/consul

name: Nomad
installCommand: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew install hashicorp/tap/nomad

name: Turso CLI
quickStart: turso auth login && turso db create opencli

name: PlanetScale CLI
quickStart: pscale auth login && pscale org list

name: Shopify CLI
quickStart: shopify auth login && shopify app init

name: uv
quickStart: uv init demo && cd demo && uv run main.py
exampleWorkflow: uv add httpx && uv run main.py

name: Deno
quickStart: deno init my-app && deno task dev

name: Poetry
quickStart: poetry new demo && cd demo && poetry install

name: Hatch
quickStart: hatch new demo && hatch run test

name: Atuin
quickStart: atuin import auto && atuin search git

name: LLM
quickStart: llm 'Explain this command: rg TODO src'

name: sqlite-utils
quickStart: sqlite-utils insert data.db items items.json --pk id

name: oracle
quickStart: oracle "Summarize the architecture of this repo"
tagline: CLI wrapper around OpenAI Responses API with high-reasoning model modes.

name: mcporter
tagline: Runtime and CLI for connecting to configured Model Context Protocol servers.

name: Basecamp CLI
quickStart: basecamp auth login && basecamp projects list
tagline: Manage projects, todos, messages, and more from the terminal.
bestFor: Project management workflows, todos, messages, and search inside Basecamp from the terminal.
useThisIf: You're on Basecamp and want the official CLI for project management workflows and agent-driven automation.
skipIf: You don't use Basecamp or you need something that works offline without authentication.
keywords: project management todos messages cards campfire search

name: Tempo CLI
quickStart: tempo wallet login && tempo wallet services --search ai
keywords: wallet cli machine payments mpp stablecoins paid api requests
bestFor: Best for giving an agent wallet access, service discovery, and paid HTTP requests.
useThisIf: Use this if you want an agent to discover services, preview costs, and make paid requests with a real wallet context.
skipIf: Skip this if you do not want wallet setup, authentication, or payment-bearing requests in the loop yet.
